Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class IRABeneficiaryEnrollmentMetadataCreate

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.IRABeneficiaryEnrollmentMetadataCreate
public class IRABeneficiaryEnrollmentMetadataCreate extends Object
IRABeneficiaryEnrollmentMetadataCreate

Enrollment metadata for beneficiary IRA accounts enrollment type

    • dividendReinvestmentPlan

      public Optional<IRABeneficiaryEnrollmentMetadataCreateDividendReinvestmentPlan> dividendReinvestmentPlan()

    • inheritedFromOwnerBirthDate

      public Optional<DateCreate> inheritedFromOwnerBirthDate()
      Represents a whole or partial calendar date, such as a birthday. The time of day and time zone are either specified elsewhere or are insignificant. The date is relative to the Gregorian Calendar. This can represent one of the following:

      * A full date, with non-zero year, month, and day values * A month and day value, with a zero year, such as an anniversary * A year on its own, with zero month and day values * A year and month value, with a zero day, such as a credit card expiration date

      Related types are [google.type.TimeOfDay][google.type.TimeOfDay] and `google.protobuf.Timestamp`.

    • inheritedFromOwnerDeathDate

      public Optional<DateCreate> inheritedFromOwnerDeathDate()
      Represents a whole or partial calendar date, such as a birthday. The time of day and time zone are either specified elsewhere or are insignificant. The date is relative to the Gregorian Calendar. This can represent one of the following:

      * A full date, with non-zero year, month, and day values * A month and day value, with a zero year, such as an anniversary * A year on its own, with zero month and day values * A year and month value, with a zero day, such as a credit card expiration date

      Related types are [google.type.TimeOfDay][google.type.TimeOfDay] and `google.protobuf.Timestamp`.

    • inheritedFromOwnerName

      public String inheritedFromOwnerName()
      The name of the owner from whom the account is inherited

    • inheritorIsDecedentsSpouse

      public boolean inheritorIsDecedentsSpouse()
      Indicates if the customer is the spouse of the decedent

      Represents a whole or partial calendar date, such as a birthday. The time of day and time zone are either specified elsewhere or are insignificant. The date is relative to the Gregorian Calendar. This can represent one of the following:

      * A full date, with non-zero year, month, and day values * A month and day value, with a zero year, such as an anniversary * A year on its own, with zero month and day values * A year and month value, with a zero day, such as a credit card expiration date

      Related types are [google.type.TimeOfDay][google.type.TimeOfDay] and `google.protobuf.Timestamp`.
